title: Warm French Sausage Gratin
description: A lacto-vegetarian-friendly dish from Brittany featuring Italian fennel sausages in a rich beurre-monte sauce, served in individual mini cocottes.

ingredients.name: Italian fennel sausages
ingredients.notes: sweet Italian sausage with fennel seeds

ingredients.name: beurre-monte
ingredients.notes: mountain butter with garlic and parsley

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the Italian fennel sausages in a skillet over medium heat until browned on all sides.
Slice the cooked sausages into 1/2 inch thick rounds.
In a separate saucepan, combine the beurre-monte, heavy cream, and shredded gruyere cheese, and stir over low heat until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Add the sliced onion and minced garlic to the saucepan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Butter the inside of four individual mini cocottes.
Add a few slices of sausage to each cocotte, then spoon some of the beurre-monte sauce over the sausage.
Top each cocotte with additional shredded gruyere cheese.
Bake the gratins in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
